Author: Boujee Becky
Name: Deathroll Manager
Punchline: Track and run Deathroll games at FFXIV venues with live danger meters, battle animations, and tournament brackets.
Description: Track live Deathroll games with a real-time danger meter and animated stick-figure battle scene. Run full tournaments with single or double elimination brackets in V-bracket or left-to-right layouts. The relay system broadcasts your bracket to spectators via /say with a 6-character code and syncs live to a web viewer at tometools.com/bracket — no plugin required for spectators. Venue-tagged leaderboards track wins, losses, net gil, and win rates across all your events. Roll button auto-sends /random when it is your turn. Games and history persist between sessions.
Changelog: v1.0.1 — Relay /say messages are now rate-limited (1 per second) to prevent FFXIV chat spam drops. Added 'Broadcast via /say' checkbox to disable in-game relay and use web viewer only. Updated Help tab relay documentation. MC announcement channel now shows correctly in custom macro tooltips.
